capabilities.name: Install template/theme
capabilities.notes: Skill surface missing — list_templates explicitly says 'NOT for: actually installing a template (use the admin UI)'.

capabilities.name: Preview before install
capabilities.notes: Skill surface missing — list_templates returns catalog metadata only, no preview skill.

capabilities.name: Seeds pages/posts/products
capabilities.verify: useTemplateInstaller.ts creates pages, blog posts, products from template data
capabilities.notes: Skill surface missing — seeding only runs through the admin install flow.

capabilities.name: Theme/brand settings
capabilities.notes: Branding skills live in pages-module skillSeeds, not templates-module.

capabilities.name: Seeds FlowPilot soul+objectives
capabilities.verify: useTemplateInstaller.ts:622 — 'Templates no longer seed FlowPilot objectives, automations, or workflows'
capabilities.notes: Moved to useFlowPilotBootstrap on module enable; no template-side skill or seeding remains.

capabilities.name: Export current site as reusable template
